# beget_cdn (Resource)

CDN resource.

## Origin types

The `origin` attribute supports two source types:

- **`s3`**: S3 service UUID. The provider resolves the source domain from the service slug.
- **`domain`**: Source content domain.

## Resource domains

The `resource_domain` attribute contains user-facing CDN domains. All CDN domains must be added in Control Panel before use in Terraform plan. The API adds a technical domain automatically, and the provider exposes it through the `resource_tech_domain` attribute.

## Settings

The `settings` attribute controls CDN behavior such as caching, browser cache duration, cookie and query string handling, gzip compression, content slicing, CORS, and custom request or response headers.

## Example Usage
```terraform
data "beget_region" "ru1" {
  id = "ru1"
}

resource "beget_cdn" "domain_origin_alt" {
  name   = "cdn-domain-alt"
  region = data.beget_region.ru1.out_id

  origin = {
    type     = "domain"
    value    = "origin2.example.com"
    protocol = "HTTP"
  }

  resource_domain = [
    "download.example.com",
  ]

  settings = {
    content_slice = true
  }
}

output "cdn_domain_origin_alt" {
  value = {
    id              = beget_cdn.domain_origin_alt.id
    origin_value    = beget_cdn.domain_origin_alt.origin.value
    resource_domain = beget_cdn.domain_origin_alt.resource_domain
  }
}
```
```terraform
data "beget_region" "ru1" {
  id = "ru1"
}

resource "beget_cdn" "domain_origin" {
  name   = "cdn-domain"
  region = data.beget_region.ru1.out_id

  origin = {
    type     = "domain"
    value    = "origin.example.com"
    protocol = "HTTP"
  }

  resource_domain = [
    "cdn.example.com",
    "static.example.com",
  ]

  settings = {
    caching_time         = 3600
    caching_time_browser = 86400

    gzip_enable  = true
    cors_enabled = true
    cors_always  = true

    static_response_headers = {
      "X-Custom-Header" = "value"
    }
  }
}

output "cdn_domain_origin" {
  value = {
    id               = beget_cdn.domain_origin.id
    resource_domains = beget_cdn.domain_origin.resource_domain
    origin_type      = beget_cdn.domain_origin.origin.type
  }
}
```
```terraform
data "beget_region" "ru1" {
  id = "ru1"
}

resource "beget_s3_bucket" "origin" {
  name        = "cdn-origin-bucket"
  description = "S3 origin for CDN"
  region      = data.beget_region.ru1.out_id
}

resource "beget_cdn" "s3_origin" {
  name   = "cdn-s3"
  region = data.beget_region.ru1.out_id

  origin = {
    type  = "s3"
    value = beget_s3_bucket.origin.id
  }

  resource_domain = [
    "assets.example.com",
  ]

  settings = {
    caching_time        = 3600
    ignore_query_string = true
    content_slice       = true
  }
}

output "cdn_s3_origin" {
  value = {
    id              = beget_cdn.s3_origin.id
    origin_type     = beget_cdn.s3_origin.origin.type
    resource_domain = beget_cdn.s3_origin.resource_domain
  }
}
```
<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) CDN name displayed in Control Panel
- `origin` (Attributes) Content source for CDN (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--origin))
- `region` (String)
- `resource_domain` (Set of String) Domains for content distribution. All the domains must be added in Control Panel before use

### Optional

- `settings` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--settings))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `resource_tech_domain` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--origin"></a>
### Nested Schema for `origin`

Required:

- `type` (String)
- `value` (String)

Optional:

- `protocol` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `settings`

Optional:

- `caching_time` (Number)
- `caching_time_browser` (Number)
- `content_slice` (Boolean)
- `cors_always` (Boolean)
- `cors_enabled` (Boolean)
- `gzip_enable` (Boolean)
- `ignore_cookie` (Boolean)
- `ignore_query_string` (Boolean)
- `response_headers_hiding_header` (List of String)
- `static_request_headers` (Map of String)
- `static_response_headers` (Map of String)
